---
title: "Publications"
---

## Peer-Reviewed Journal Articles

1. **Pradhan, P.** (2025). "Application of analytic hierarchy process for mapping flood vulnerability in Odisha using Google Earth Engine." In *Google Earth Engine and Artificial Intelligence for Earth Observation*. 
   [<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/390714931_Application_of_analytic_hierarchy_process_for_mapping_flood_vulnerability_in_Odisha_using_Google_Earth_Engine){.social-btn}
   [<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI: 10.1016/j.gee.2025.025](https://doi.org/10.1016/b978-0-443-27372-8.00025-8){.social-btn}

2. **Pradhan, P.** (2024). "Agricultural drought monitoring using Google Earth Engine: a study of Paschim Medinipur district, West Bengal." In *Modern Cartography Series*. 
   [<i class="bi bi-file-earmark-pdf"></i> ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/publication/384435525_Agricultural_drought_monitoring_using_Google_Earth_Engine_a_study_of_Paschim_Medinipur_district_West_Bengal){.social-btn}
   [<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> DOI: 10.1016/j.mcs.2024.011](https://doi.org/10.1016/b978-0-443-23890-1.00011-6){.social-btn}

## Conference Presentations & Workshops

- **Pradhan, P.** (2024). "Drought Monitoring with GEE AI Assistant powered by Gemini API." GDG for Earth Engine Nairobi (Virtual). 
  [<i class="bi bi-presentation-ctnr"></i> Presentation](https://gdg.community.dev/events/details/google-gdg-for-earth-engine-nairobi-presents-drought-monitoring-with-google-earth-engine-ai-assistant-powered-by-gemini-api/){.social-btn}
  [<i class="bi bi-link-45deg"></i> Details](https://gdg.community.dev/events/details/google-gdg-for-earth-engine-nairobi-presents-drought-monitoring-with-google-earth-engine-ai-assistant-powered-by-gemini-api/){.social-btn}

- **Pradhan, P.** (2026, Upcoming). "The Future of Open Source GIS." Keynote Address, International Cartographic Conference.

## Other Scholarly Works

- **Pradhan, P.** (2023). "Remote Sensing in the Anthropocene." In *Modern Geography: A Review*. Springer.

---

Full publication lists available via:

[<i class="bi bi-mortarboard"></i> Google Scholar](https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=_DhEQHEAAAAJ){.social-btn}
[<i class="bi bi-person-badge"></i> ResearchGate](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Pulakesh-Pradhan){.social-btn}
